subject: [PATCH v4 00/14] userfaultfd: working set tracking for VM guest memory

reviews.author: Kiryl Shutsemau (Meta)
reviews.summary: Author provided additional context and clarification on the patch series, but no substantive review or feedback was given.

2026-05-25.patch_summary: This patch series adds userfaultfd support for tracking the working set of VM guest memory, enabling a VMM to identify cold pages and evict them to tiered or remote storage. The approach involves introducing a new userfaultfd registration mode (RWP) that uses the same mechanism as existing modes but with additional features for read-write protection tracking.
